> Cheri — 2026-04-23 10:59
> there are basically 4 ways to play tawil
> 
> - Monowil. You use tawil as a dps tank support in mono chaos team. Not really possible for new players because u need a lot of keyflare and posses
> 
> - Bluwil. Use tawil as dps tank support in aequor team. You can get a lot of op cards from their exalt in aequor, and tentacles help with sustain. Probably the most new player friendly.
> 
> - Redwil. You run tawil with pickman. Not a real team unless u have both of them.
> 
> - Ultrawil. You run tawil as a support and fetch all the weird niche cards from exalt. They can cosplay as horla and give u a horla mood aura

Trying to figure out how
Caro team heals

I’m having trouble with survivability in 3-13
It's not a card
It's the circle with red liquid close to the bar on top of the characters heads
That circle is the Crimson Furnace
*That* is the heal
The Embryo is, how you already saw, a mini battery/buff as well of food for the Exalt of the caro characters to buff them and give extra effects
Oh I see
How you trigger it then because I’m running caro team
But didnt see anything

It is literally just click the circle when there's any value on it. A pop-up will appear asking to confirm that you want that heal and, after the confirmation, it gives that amount of healing. Yes, it is simple as that.
